Package Manager for Windows

About Software Manager

Information about this application

Version Information

Version: 1.0.0

Build: 2025.01.06

Platform: Windows

Features

  • Winget Package Support
  • Chocolatey Support
  • Automated Backup
  • One-Click Restore

Description

Software Manager is a professional desktop application built with Test-Driven Development principles. It helps you backup and restore your Windows software packages using popular package managers like Winget and Chocolatey. Create portable backup bundles of your installed software and restore them on any Windows machine with ease.
